pr377.reason: Phase-4 / RESPONSE_BODY late-intervention handling for the NGINX connector.

config.reason: NGINX module build metadata; migrated to adapter-owned source without PR #377 changes.

src/ddebug.h.reason: Repo-owned debug compatibility header replacing the imported upstream debug helper.

src/ngx_http_modsecurity_access.c.reason: Migrated upstream access-phase integration to adapter-owned source.

src/ngx_http_modsecurity_body_filter.c.reason: Migrated upstream body filter and applied PR #377 phase-4 late-intervention changes.

src/ngx_http_modsecurity_common.h.reason: Migrated shared NGINX declarations and applied PR #377 phase-4 fields.

src/ngx_http_modsecurity_header_filter.c.reason: Migrated upstream header filter integration to adapter-owned source.

src/ngx_http_modsecurity_log.c.reason: Migrated upstream log-phase integration to adapter-owned source.

src/ngx_http_modsecurity_module.c.reason: Migrated module/config entrypoint and applied PR #377 phase-4 directives.

layout.phase13: Strict source layout: connector src/ contains only productive NGINX source/header files; config and metadata live at connector root and materialize to the build layout expected by NGINX.

connectors/nginx/metadata.c.reason: Repo-owned adapter metadata helper; intentionally not materialized into the productive NGINX connector build source.

connectors/nginx/metadata.h.reason: Repo-owned adapter metadata declarations; intentionally not materialized into the productive NGINX connector build source.

connectors/nginx/SOURCE_MAP.json.reason: Repo-owned per-file provenance manifest; consumed by the materializer but not copied into connector-src.
